home.loginExpiredDesc: Your login session has expired. Please log in again to continue.
home.radicalDesc: The buying strategy is very aggressive, often resulting in buying in before the best entry point and being trapped with funds.
home.analyticalDesc: An early-stage trader, making him a fit for the beginner role.
home.cautiousDesc: Bullish-oriented and confident in uptrends, making him a natural fit for the long-side role.
home.adventureDesc: Fast in capturing short-term swings, making him an ideal fit for the scalping role.
home.radicalShortDesc: Bearish-oriented and sharp in spotting downturns, making him a natural fit for the short-side role.
home.assetDiagnosticDesc: Potential Liquidation Risk: Maintaining your current positions may expose you to a liquidation event if adverse market movements continue. Consider monitoring margin levels closely.
home.assetDiagnosticDesc2: Profit Protection Opportunity: Closing part or all of your positions now can secure unrealized gains and prevent potential profit erosion from market retracements.
home.assetDiagnosticDesc3: Use this insight to make informed decisions and manage risk proactively.
home.readOnlyApiDesc: A read-only API key only allows viewing balances, positions, and trade history, with absolutely no ability to trade, withdraw, or change your account, making it safe to share—and you can disable it anytime，Learn through the following tutorial docs.
home.checkInWallet: You can check it in your wallet.
home.retroactiveBonusDesc: A one-time reward issued after you connect your API, automatically calculated based on your liquidation history from the past 6 months.
home.recurringRewardsDesc: Ongoing rewards distributed every 30 days, based on your new liquidation records during each period.

tribe.desc: Trader Board is LinkLayerAI's AI-powered ranking system. Rankings are continuously updated based on these real-time analytical insights.

points.title: Points
points.desc: Points will be converted into Tokens for LLM training and conversations.
points.smallDesc1:
In LLM, text is broken down into tokens. For example,
  "Hello, world!" might be split into two tokens: "Hello" and "world." These tokens are provided as input to the model, and the model generates a response based on these tokens.
points.smallDesc2: Each time the model is called, the number of input and output tokens affects the computational cost. The tokens in the input text consume part of the resources, and the generated response also uses tokens. LLMs usually charge or impose limits based on the total number of input and output tokens. For example, if you provide 100 tokens as input and the model generates 50 tokens in response, a total of 150 tokens will be consumed.

subscribe.title: Points Subscription
subscribe.desc1: Payments are accepted in BEP20 USDT by default. Please use an EVM-compatible wallet for transactions.
subscribe.desc2: LLAx is a rights-based compensation granted to users who pay for Agent subscription fees. It can be used for future Agent payments, converted into the governance token LLA, and also grants holders access to ongoing revenue sharing from AI-related businesses.
subscribe.desc3: Quarterly and annual plans offer flexible access to AI services, with LLAx rewards based on the subscription amount, regardless of the discount level.
subscribe.desc4: Strategy Agent currently focuses on single-token strategy services. As strategy types grow, it will support more dimensions of token selection — such as short-term vs. mid-to-long-term approaches.
subscribe.desc5: We enable users to turn their trading ideas into reality through natural language. Users simply describe their strategies in plain English (or any supported language), and our Agent takes care of the rest — from interpreting the logic to generating the underlying execution code. Once created, these customized strategies can be deployed and interacted with entirely through natural language, making advanced trading accessible to everyone without the need to write a single line of code.
subscribe.desc6: LinkLayerAI offers a comprehensive multi-channel product suite and integrates a high-quality KOL database based on product promotion data.
